title: BudgetState
description: Category budgets and current headroom derived from TransactionStream inflows/outflows (FR-CORE-003). Provided by Module 0 to all modules. Headroom is a PRIMARY MONEY input to spend recommendations: stale/missing BudgetState MUST cause dependent recommendations to withhold (Constitution IV/VI; mirrors Rewards FR-REW-003). All amounts integer cents.

period_start.description: Budget period start (typically the user's statement/calendar month).

total_headroom.description: budgeted - spent across all categories, integer cents. Negative = over budget.

category.description: Canonical category key; bilingual label resolved at the edge.

headroom.description: budgeted - spent for this category, integer cents. Negative = over budget.

status.description: Derived band; near_limit threshold is a user-adjustable default.

data_completeness.description: partial when computed on a partial account picture; consumers MUST mark recommendations as incomplete-data (Partial state).

freshness.description: Freshness of the underlying balances/transactions this budget was derived from. Stale ⇒ consumers withhold spend recommendations.
